The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, offering several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce pain, improve immune function, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Tieghememopanax elegans include sesquiterpenoids, phenolic acids, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
